advisories.reason: Transitive dep of @lovable.dev/mcp-js -> @modelcontextprotocol/sdk. Used only inside the Supabase edge function (supabase/functions/mcp) and MCP tools under src/lib/mcp — never bundled into the browser client. Advisory is Windows-only path traversal in serve-static; the edge function runs on Deno/Linux and does not serve static files. No upstream fix available.

Nested under node_modules/@lovable.dev/mcp-js/node_modules/esbuild. Advisory affects only the esbuild dev server on Windows; this copy is never invoked as a dev server (mcp-js uses esbuild as a build helper). Project's top-level esbuild is already on a fixed version. Waiting on upstream mcp-js to bump.

notes: Add { "id": "<GHSA/npm advisory id>", "package": "<name>", "reason": "<why non-exploitable>", "expires": "YYYY-MM-DD" } entries here to allowlist known non-exploitable PRODUCTION advisories. Dev-only advisories are already excluded via --omit=dev. Reviewed quarterly.
